patches.anchor_before: | prosauai-api | ✅ Operacional | 001-006 | Webhook + health + debounce + multi-tenant auth (X-Webhook-Secret) + MECE router + idempotency + **conversation pipeline 12-step** (customer lifecycle, context window, intent classifier, LLM agent pydantic-ai, safety guards 3-layer, tool registry, evaluator) + **DB migrations** (7 files, asyncpg pool, RLS on all tables) + **schema isolation** (`prosauai` + `prosauai_ops`). OTel SDK + structlog bridge. Port 8050. **Nota:** LLM orchestration atualmente roda inline na API (sem worker separado) |
patches.new_content: | prosauai-api | ✅ Operacional | 001-006, 009 | Webhook + health + debounce + multi-tenant auth (X-Webhook-Secret) + MECE router + idempotency + **conversation pipeline 13-step** (customer lifecycle, context window, **content_process** step 6 — Whisper STT + gpt-4o-mini vision via `run_content_process` orquestrador — ADR-032, intent classifier, LLM agent pydantic-ai, safety guards 3-layer, tool registry, evaluator) + **RedisProcessorCache + PgBudgetTracker** instanciados no startup (`main.py` lifespan) + **DB migrations** (7 files, asyncpg pool com `pool_tenant`=`authenticated`/NOBYPASSRLS + `pool_admin`=`service_role`/BYPASSRLS — ADR-011 + ADR-027) + **schema isolation** (`prosauai` + `prosauai_ops`). OTel SDK + structlog bridge. Port 8050. **Nota:** LLM orchestration atualmente roda inline na API (sem worker separado); content processing roda pre-debounce quando `ProcessorContext` disponivel, com fallback para texto bruto caso contrario |
patches.reason: Commits c45f658 (wirou run_content_process pre-debounce + RedisProcessorCache/PgBudgetTracker no startup) e f48cf35 (timeout ImageProcessor 12s->30s) mostram que o pipeline agora e 13-step em producao (step 6 content_process da ADR-032). Doc dizia '12-step' pre-epic-009. Epic tag epic:009 nao foi usada nesses fixes, entao ficaram como drift.
